Total Severity Score (Adm) CHAR 2 This column documents the total mood score by adding the frequencies documented in the questions above at the time of admission. 00 = Minimum Total Severity Score 
27 = Maximum Total Severity Score 
99 = Patient was unable to complete the interview 
- = Not Assessed/No Information
